name: Old-Fashioned Tomato Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a skillet until crisp. Remove with paper towels and discard.
2. Use the remaining drippings to cook onion until tender.
3. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper; cook over low heat until mixture is golden brown.
4. Gradually add tomatoes and tomato juice; stir well.
5. Bring to a boil over medium heat. Cook and stir for 2 minutes.
6. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 15-20 minutes or until thickened, stirring occasionally.
7. Stir in bacon.
8. Serve over biscuits. Makes 6-8 servings.
